description: Core table containing patent application records with filing details, family information, and key metrics like grant status and citation counts.

columns.name: appln_filing_year
columns.description: Year extracted from the filing date for easier temporal analysis.

columns.name: appln_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each patent application in the database.

columns.name: appln_auth
columns.description: Two-letter code of the patent authority where the application was filed.

columns.name: appln_nr
columns.description: Application number assigned by the patent authority in a standardized format.

columns.name: appln_kind
columns.description: Single-letter code indicating the type of application (e.g., patent, utility model).

columns.name: appln_filing_date
columns.description: Date when the patent application was officially filed with the patent authority.

columns.name: appln_nr_epodoc
columns.description: Application number in EPODOC format, a standardized European Patent Office format.

columns.name: appln_nr_original
columns.description: Original application number as assigned by the filing authority before standardization.

columns.name: receiving_office
columns.description: Patent office that received the international application (relevant for PCT applications).

columns.name: int_phase
columns.description: Indicator of whether the application is in the international phase of the PCT process.

columns.name: nat_phase
columns.description: Indicator of whether the application has entered the national phase from PCT.

columns.name: earliest_filing_date
columns.description: Filing date of the earliest priority application in the patent family.

columns.name: earliest_filing_id
columns.description: Application ID of the earliest priority application in the family.

columns.name: earliest_publn_date
columns.description: Date of the first publication anywhere in the patent family.

columns.name: earliest_pat_publn_id
columns.description: Publication ID of the earliest publication in the patent family.

columns.name: granted
columns.description: Flag indicating whether the patent application was granted (Y) or not (N).

columns.name: inpadoc_family_id
columns.description: Identifier grouping related patent applications into an extended INPADOC family.

columns.name: nb_citing_docdb_fam
columns.description: Count of distinct DOCDB families that cite this application, indicating technological impact.

columns.name: nb_applicants
columns.description: Number of applicants listed on the patent application.

columns.name: nb_inventors
columns.description: Number of inventors listed on the patent application.

columns.name: ipr_type
columns.description: Type of intellectual property right (e.g., patent, utility model, plant patent).

columns.name: internat_appln_id
columns.description: Application ID of the corresponding international (PCT) application if applicable.

columns.name: reg_phase
columns.description: Indicator of whether the application is in the regional phase (e.g., European phase).

columns.name: earliest_filing_year
columns.description: Year of the earliest filing date for temporal analysis.

columns.name: earliest_publn_year
columns.description: Year of the earliest publication date for temporal analysis.

columns.name: docdb_family_id
columns.description: Identifier grouping patent applications claiming the same priority into a DOCDB family.

columns.name: docdb_family_size
columns.description: Number of patent applications in the DOCDB family, indicating geographic breadth.
